name: Rum Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
2. Let the mixture stand for 1 hour at room temperature.
3. Roll approximately 1 tablespoon-sized portions into balls and lightly roll in powdered sugar.
4. Store in an airtight container for up to 5-6 weeks.
5. Makes about 5 dozen rum balls.
Notes of importance: This is a very simple recipe, but my sister, who gave me the recipe, says everyone prefers these over others. The original recipe came from a Pacific Gas & Electric insert.
